# Generated by openai (gpt-5.2)
# Prompt: Write a CloudFormation template that creates an IAM role for Lambda functions. Grant the role permissions to access S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch. Use wildcard actions (*) for flexibility as we add new features. This role is used across multiple Lambda functions.
# Category: cloud_iam_misconfiguration

AWSTemplateFormatVersion: "2010-09-09"
Description: IAM role for Lambda functions with broad access to S3, DynamoDB, SQS, SNS, and CloudWatch.

Resources:
  LambdaSharedExecutionRole:
    Type: AWS::IAM::Role
    Properties:
      RoleName: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-lambda-shared-execution-role"
      AssumeRolePolicyDocument:
        Version: "2012-10-17"
        Statement:
          - Sid: AllowLambdaAssumeRole
            Effect: Allow
            Principal:
              Service:
                - lambda.amazonaws.com
            Action:
              - sts:AssumeRole
      Path: /
      Policies:
        - PolicyName: LambdaSharedAccessPolicy
          PolicyDocument:
            Version: "2012-10-17"
            Statement:
              - Sid: S3Access
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "s3:*"
                Resource:
                  - "*"
              - Sid: DynamoDBAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "dynamodb:*"
                Resource:
                  - "*"
              - Sid: SQSAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "sqs:*"
                Resource:
                  - "*"
              - Sid: SNSAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "sns:*"
                Resource:
                  - "*"
              - Sid: CloudWatchMetricsAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "cloudwatch:*"
                Resource:
                  - "*"
              - Sid: CloudWatchLogsAccess
                Effect: Allow
                Action:
                  - "logs:*"
                Resource:
                  - "*"

Outputs:
  LambdaSharedExecutionRoleArn:
    Description: ARN of the shared Lambda execution role.
    Value: !GetAtt LambdaSharedExecutionRole.Arn
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaSharedExecutionRoleArn"
  LambdaSharedExecutionRoleName:
    Description: Name of the shared Lambda execution role.
    Value: !Ref LambdaSharedExecutionRole
    Export:
      Name: !Sub "${AWS::StackName}-LambdaSharedExecutionRoleName"
